outcome: Under 5 years of age fully immunised with all scheduled vaccines
source_quote: The proportion of fully vaccinated children was about 22% at baseline in all three arms. At end line, this proportion had increased to 25% (22-28) in arm A, 32% (29-35) in arm B, and 34% (31-37) in arm C. 7.3% (95% CI 4.5-10.0) increase in arm B vs arm A; 9.5% (6.9-12.0) increase in arm C vs arm A; overall p<0.0001. Table 4: Vaccination status of children according to routine EPI schedule
